title: Adaptive Revision Strategy
summary: Revision efficiency improves using weak-topic and wrong-answer loops.
fullContent: Adaptive revision schedules prioritize high-revision-weight topics, recent mistakes, and lower-confidence domains.
importantPoints: Re-attempt wrong questions in spaced intervals
consultantNotes: A 20-minute targeted revision block is often enough for retention
realWorldExamples: Learners improved mock score by 14% with adaptive queues
commonMistakes: Repeating solved easy topics while ignoring weak areas
interviewQuestions: How do you build a data-driven revision strategy?
